## Summary
- explain the user-facing or system-facing outcome of this PR
- keep each point scoped to a meaningful change

## Why
- state the problem this PR solves
- note why this change belongs in this slice now

## Changes
- list the main implementation changes
- include any docs, tests, or CI updates that matter for review

## Testing
- list the exact commands run locally
- include any checks not run and why

## Risks
- call out rollout concerns, security implications, or follow-up work
